---
title: Group Assignment 4 (18%)
---

**Files for download**:

* Download the template

::: {.callout appearance="minimal"}
<i class="bi bi-download"></i> [GA4_template.qmd](../assignment_data/GA4_template.qmd){download="GA4_template.qmd"}
:::

::: {.callout appearance="minimal"}
<i class="bi bi-download"></i> [GA4 suggested solutions.html](GroupAssignment4Solution.html){download="GroupAssignment4Solution.html"}
:::


You are to submit both an `GA4_GroupNo.qmd` file and a compiled `GA4_GroupNo.pdf` file for your assignment.

```{r}
#| output: asis
source(here::here("course_info.R"))
submit(schedule, "GA4")
```
